task: 把 translation/memory/job_memory.py 拆成候选提取、术语筛选、记忆读写、提示词可用性判断四层，减少 regex 规则和持久化逻辑互相缠绕
verify:
python3 -m py_compile backend/scripts/services/translation/memory/*.py backend/scripts/runtime/pipeline/book_translation_executor.py backend/scripts/runtime/pipeline/book_translation_batches.py backend/scripts/runtime/pipeline/book_translation_batch_runner.py backend/scripts/runtime/pipeline/book_translation_result_applier.py; PYTHONPATH=backend/scripts python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
from services.translation.memory import JobMemory, JobMemoryStore, update_job_memory_from_batch
m = JobMemory.empty(Path('/tmp/job-memory.json'))
changed = update_job_memory_from_batch(m, batch=[{'item_id':'p001-b001','source_text':'Default: 0\nType: <INT>'}], translated={'p001-b001': {'translated_text':'Default: 0\nType: <INT>'}})
print('memory_imports_ok', isinstance(JobMemoryStore(Path('/tmp/job-memory.json')), JobMemoryStore), changed, bool(m.preserve_hints))
PY
python3 -m compileall -q backend/scripts/services/translation/memory backend/scripts/runtime/pipeline; python3 backend/scripts/devtools/check_pipeline_architecture.py

verify:
